statement.en: Detection of a Sequence Feature for Recursive Splicing
statement.summary: This package contains Jupyter Notebooks for recursive splicing sequence analysis in order to identify cis- and trans-acting factors associated with recursive splicing regulations and predict recursive splicing site usage.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission describes a computational method for detecting sequence features in recursive splicing—a phenomenon in molecular biology. The axiom is provisional because: (1) it represents recent empirical work (2026) in active research; (2) recursive splicing itself is increasingly recognized but not universally characterized; (3) the approach relies on machine learning/computational heuristics whose validation depends on held-out test performance and replication; (4) no explicit peer review status is indicated. This is typical preprint or early-stage validated work, not yet established canonical fact.
